The '''Authority Data Center''' was the repository of nearly all information processed by computers in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orron III]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> It was highly guarded by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]].

{{Struct-stub}}
